code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut s = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 10 or c == 9 or c == 13
        if string.len(cur) > 0
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            match idx
            when 0
              a = v
            when 1
              b = v
            when 2
              s = v
            when _
              ()
            end
            idx = idx + 1
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      match idx
      when 0
        a = v
      when 1
        b = v
      when 2
        s = v
      when _
        ()
      end
      idx = idx + 1
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
end
